title: erigeron squarrosus
intro: Erigeron squarrosus, also known as Squarrose Fleabane, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its white or pink flowers and silvery-gray leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Erigeron squarrosus include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
